privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic Android project called QuickSnap located at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/QuickSnap. The project directory contains two key files that agents must modify: (1) the Android manifest file at app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml, which initially lacks the CAMERA permission, and (2) the main activity file at app/src/main/java/com/example/quicksnap/MainActivity.kt, which initially lacks runtime permission request logic using modern AndroidX APIs. The project uses Gradle build system with compileSdk 34, minSdk 24, and targetSdk 34, with dependencies on androidx.core:core-ktx:1.12.0, androidx.appcompat:appcompat:1.6.1, and androidx.activity:activity-ktx:1.8.2. Verification checks for the presence of ActivityResultContracts.RequestPermission, registerForActivityResult, checkSelfPermission calls, and successful compilation via Gradle.
